name: Bobby Judge Mode
description: Adversarial audit of Bobby's 3-agent debate system. Evaluates debate quality, bias detection, conviction calibration, and decision integrity.
protocol: Bobby Protocol — Intelligence Protocol on X Layer

agents_under_review.name: Red Team
agents_under_review.role: Defensive — destroys weak theses, enforces risk

agents_under_review.name: Bobby CIO
agents_under_review.role: Judge — makes final call with conviction score

data_integrity.description: Did agents cite real data from the briefing? Are numbers accurate?
data_integrity.scoring: 1-5: 1=fabricated data, 3=partial citation, 5=every claim backed by briefing data

adversarial_quality.description: Did Red Team genuinely challenge Alpha? Or was it superficial?
adversarial_quality.scoring: 1-5: 1=agrees with Alpha, 3=generic pushback, 5=identifies specific flaw with counter-evidence

decision_logic.description: Does CIO's verdict logically follow from the debate? Is conviction justified?
decision_logic.scoring: 1-5: 1=arbitrary, 3=loosely connected, 5=clear cause-effect from debate to decision

risk_management.description: Are stop losses tight? Is position sizing reasonable for conviction level?
risk_management.scoring: 1-5: 1=no stops, 3=stops exist but wide, 5=stops tight with clear invalidation

calibration_alignment.description: Does conviction match historical accuracy at this confidence level?

novelty.description: Did the debate surface non-obvious insights vs repeating common narratives?
novelty.scoring: 1-5: 1=pure narrative, 3=some unique angle, 5=genuinely novel thesis with edge

bias_detection.recency_bias: Over-weighting last 24h price action vs structural trend
bias_detection.confirmation_bias: Cherry-picking indicators that support pre-existing view
bias_detection.anchoring: Fixating on a specific price level without justification
bias_detection.loss_aversion: Avoiding valid trades due to recent losses (tilted state)

verdict_schema.overall_score: number 1-100 — weighted composite of all dimensions
verdict_schema.biases_detected: string[] — list of detected cognitive biases
verdict_schema.rationale: string — 2-3 sentence explanation of the judge's verdict
verdict_schema.red_flags: string[] — critical issues that should block execution
